per_question.question: What military awards were received by the General originally scheduled to lead Operation Torch before Lieutenant General Dwight D. Eisenhower was given command of the operation?
per_question.gold: Joseph Stilwell was originally scheduled to lead Operation Torch before Lieutenant General Dwight D. Eisenhower was given command of the operation. Stillwell received a Distinguished Service Cross, two Army Distinguished Service Medals, a Legion of Merit award, and a Bronze Star during his military career.
